<a id="class-filedialog"></a>

# FileDialog

**Inherits:** [ConfirmationDialog](class_confirmationdialog.md#class-confirmationdialog) **<** [AcceptDialog](class_acceptdialog.md#class-acceptdialog) **<** [Window](class_window.md#class-window) **<** [Viewport](class_viewport.md#class-viewport) **<** [Node](class_node.md#class-node) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

**Inherited By:** [EditorFileDialog](class_editorfiledialog.md#class-editorfiledialog)

A dialog for selecting files or directories in the filesystem.

## Description

**FileDialog** is a preset dialog used to choose files and directories in the filesystem. It supports filter masks. **FileDialog** automatically sets its window title according to the [file_mode](#class-filedialog-property-file-mode). If you want to use a custom title, disable this by setting [mode_overrides_title](#class-filedialog-property-mode-overrides-title) to `false`.

**Note:** **FileDialog** is invisible by default. To make it visible, call one of the `popup_*` methods from [Window](class_window.md#class-window) on the node, such as [Window.popup_centered_clamped()](class_window.md#class-window-method-popup-centered-clamped).

## Signals

<a id="class-filedialog-signal-dir-selected"></a>

**dir_selected**(dir: [String](class_string.md#class-string)) [🔗](#class-filedialog-signal-dir-selected)

Emitted when the user selects a directory.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-signal-file-selected"></a>

**file_selected**(path: [String](class_string.md#class-string)) [🔗](#class-filedialog-signal-file-selected)

Emitted when the user selects a file by double-clicking it or pressing the **OK** button.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-signal-filename-filter-changed"></a>

**filename_filter_changed**(filter: [String](class_string.md#class-string)) [🔗](#class-filedialog-signal-filename-filter-changed)

Emitted when the filter for file names changes.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-signal-files-selected"></a>

**files_selected**(paths: [PackedStringArray](class_packedstringarray.md#class-packedstringarray)) [🔗](#class-filedialog-signal-files-selected)

Emitted when the user selects multiple files.

## Enumerations

<a id="enum-filedialog-filemode"></a>

enum **FileMode**: [🔗](#enum-filedialog-filemode)

<a id="class-filedialog-constant-file-mode-open-file"></a>

[FileMode](#enum-filedialog-filemode) **FILE_MODE_OPEN_FILE** = `0`

The dialog allows selecting one, and only one file.

<a id="class-filedialog-constant-file-mode-open-files"></a>

[FileMode](#enum-filedialog-filemode) **FILE_MODE_OPEN_FILES** = `1`

The dialog allows selecting multiple files.

<a id="class-filedialog-constant-file-mode-open-dir"></a>

[FileMode](#enum-filedialog-filemode) **FILE_MODE_OPEN_DIR** = `2`

The dialog only allows selecting a directory, disallowing the selection of any file.

<a id="class-filedialog-constant-file-mode-open-any"></a>

[FileMode](#enum-filedialog-filemode) **FILE_MODE_OPEN_ANY** = `3`

The dialog allows selecting one file or directory.

<a id="class-filedialog-constant-file-mode-save-file"></a>

[FileMode](#enum-filedialog-filemode) **FILE_MODE_SAVE_FILE** = `4`

The dialog will warn when a file exists.

---

<a id="enum-filedialog-access"></a>

enum **Access**: [🔗](#enum-filedialog-access)

<a id="class-filedialog-constant-access-resources"></a>

[Access](#enum-filedialog-access) **ACCESS_RESOURCES** = `0`

The dialog only allows accessing files under the [Resource](class_resource.md#class-resource) path (`res://`).

<a id="class-filedialog-constant-access-userdata"></a>

[Access](#enum-filedialog-access) **ACCESS_USERDATA** = `1`

The dialog only allows accessing files under user data path (`user://`).

<a id="class-filedialog-constant-access-filesystem"></a>

[Access](#enum-filedialog-access) **ACCESS_FILESYSTEM** = `2`

The dialog allows accessing files on the whole file system.

---

<a id="enum-filedialog-displaymode"></a>

enum **DisplayMode**: [🔗](#enum-filedialog-displaymode)

<a id="class-filedialog-constant-display-thumbnails"></a>

[DisplayMode](#enum-filedialog-displaymode) **DISPLAY_THUMBNAILS** = `0`

The dialog displays files as a grid of thumbnails. Use [thumbnail_size](#class-filedialog-theme-constant-thumbnail-size) to adjust their size.

<a id="class-filedialog-constant-display-list"></a>

[DisplayMode](#enum-filedialog-displaymode) **DISPLAY_LIST** = `1`

The dialog displays files as a list of filenames.

---

<a id="enum-filedialog-customization"></a>

enum **Customization**: [🔗](#enum-filedialog-customization)

<a id="class-filedialog-constant-customization-hidden-files"></a>

[Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization) **CUSTOMIZATION_HIDDEN_FILES** = `0`

Toggles visibility of the favorite button, and the favorite list on the left side of the dialog.

Equivalent to [hidden_files_toggle_enabled](#class-filedialog-property-hidden-files-toggle-enabled).

<a id="class-filedialog-constant-customization-create-folder"></a>

[Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization) **CUSTOMIZATION_CREATE_FOLDER** = `1`

If enabled, shows the button for creating new directories (when using [FILE_MODE_OPEN_DIR](#class-filedialog-constant-file-mode-open-dir), [FILE_MODE_OPEN_ANY](#class-filedialog-constant-file-mode-open-any), or [FILE_MODE_SAVE_FILE](#class-filedialog-constant-file-mode-save-file)).

Equivalent to [folder_creation_enabled](#class-filedialog-property-folder-creation-enabled).

<a id="class-filedialog-constant-customization-file-filter"></a>

[Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization) **CUSTOMIZATION_FILE_FILTER** = `2`

If enabled, shows the toggle file filter button.

Equivalent to [file_filter_toggle_enabled](#class-filedialog-property-file-filter-toggle-enabled).

<a id="class-filedialog-constant-customization-file-sort"></a>

[Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization) **CUSTOMIZATION_FILE_SORT** = `3`

If enabled, shows the file sorting options button.

Equivalent to [file_sort_options_enabled](#class-filedialog-property-file-sort-options-enabled).

<a id="class-filedialog-constant-customization-favorites"></a>

[Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization) **CUSTOMIZATION_FAVORITES** = `4`

If enabled, shows the toggle favorite button and favorite list on the left side of the dialog.

Equivalent to [favorites_enabled](#class-filedialog-property-favorites-enabled).

<a id="class-filedialog-constant-customization-recent"></a>

[Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization) **CUSTOMIZATION_RECENT** = `5`

If enabled, shows the recent directories list on the left side of the dialog.

Equivalent to [recent_list_enabled](#class-filedialog-property-recent-list-enabled).

<a id="class-filedialog-constant-customization-layout"></a>

[Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization) **CUSTOMIZATION_LAYOUT** = `6`

If enabled, shows the layout switch buttons (list/thumbnails).

Equivalent to [layout_toggle_enabled](#class-filedialog-property-layout-toggle-enabled).

<a id="class-filedialog-constant-customization-overwrite-warning"></a>

[Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization) **CUSTOMIZATION_OVERWRITE_WARNING** = `7`

If enabled, the **FileDialog** will warn the user before overwriting files in save mode.

Equivalent to [overwrite_warning_enabled](#class-filedialog-property-overwrite-warning-enabled).

<a id="class-filedialog-constant-customization-delete"></a>

[Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization) **CUSTOMIZATION_DELETE** = `8`

If enabled, the context menu will show the "Delete" option, which allows moving files and folders to trash.

Equivalent to [deleting_enabled](#class-filedialog-property-deleting-enabled).

---

## Property Descriptions

<a id="class-filedialog-property-access"></a>

[Access](#enum-filedialog-access) **access** = `0` [🔗](#class-filedialog-property-access)

-  **set_access**(value: [Access](#enum-filedialog-access))
- [Access](#enum-filedialog-access) **get_access**()

The file system access scope.

**Warning:** In Web builds, FileDialog cannot access the host file system. In sandboxed Linux and macOS environments, [use_native_dialog](#class-filedialog-property-use-native-dialog) is automatically used to allow limited access to host file system.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-property-current-dir"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **current_dir** [🔗](#class-filedialog-property-current-dir)

-  **set_current_dir**(value: [String](class_string.md#class-string))
- [String](class_string.md#class-string) **get_current_dir**()

The current working directory of the file dialog.

**Note:** For native file dialogs, this property is only treated as a hint and may not be respected by specific OS implementations.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-property-current-file"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **current_file** [🔗](#class-filedialog-property-current-file)

-  **set_current_file**(value: [String](class_string.md#class-string))
- [String](class_string.md#class-string) **get_current_file**()

The currently selected file of the file dialog.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-property-current-path"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **current_path** [🔗](#class-filedialog-property-current-path)

-  **set_current_path**(value: [String](class_string.md#class-string))
- [String](class_string.md#class-string) **get_current_path**()

The currently selected file path of the file dialog.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-property-deleting-enabled"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **deleting_enabled** = `true` [🔗](#class-filedialog-property-deleting-enabled)

-  **set_customization_flag_enabled**(flag: [Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization), enabled: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_customization_flag_enabled**(flag: [Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization)) 

If `true`, the context menu will show the "Delete" option, which allows moving files and folders to trash.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-property-display-mode"></a>

[DisplayMode](#enum-filedialog-displaymode) **display_mode** = `0` [🔗](#class-filedialog-property-display-mode)

-  **set_display_mode**(value: [DisplayMode](#enum-filedialog-displaymode))
- [DisplayMode](#enum-filedialog-displaymode) **get_display_mode**()

Display mode of the dialog's file list.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-property-favorites-enabled"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **favorites_enabled** = `true` [🔗](#class-filedialog-property-favorites-enabled)

-  **set_customization_flag_enabled**(flag: [Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization), enabled: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_customization_flag_enabled**(flag: [Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization)) 

If `true`, shows the toggle favorite button and favorite list on the left side of the dialog.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-property-file-filter-toggle-enabled"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **file_filter_toggle_enabled** = `true` [🔗](#class-filedialog-property-file-filter-toggle-enabled)

-  **set_customization_flag_enabled**(flag: [Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization), enabled: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_customization_flag_enabled**(flag: [Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization)) 

If `true`, shows the toggle file filter button.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-property-file-mode"></a>

[FileMode](#enum-filedialog-filemode) **file_mode** = `4` [🔗](#class-filedialog-property-file-mode)

-  **set_file_mode**(value: [FileMode](#enum-filedialog-filemode))
- [FileMode](#enum-filedialog-filemode) **get_file_mode**()

The dialog's open or save mode, which affects the selection behavior.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-property-file-sort-options-enabled"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **file_sort_options_enabled** = `true` [🔗](#class-filedialog-property-file-sort-options-enabled)

-  **set_customization_flag_enabled**(flag: [Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization), enabled: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_customization_flag_enabled**(flag: [Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization)) 

If `true`, shows the file sorting options button.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-property-filename-filter"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **filename_filter** = `""` [🔗](#class-filedialog-property-filename-filter)

-  **set_filename_filter**(value: [String](class_string.md#class-string))
- [String](class_string.md#class-string) **get_filename_filter**()

The filter for file names (case-insensitive). When set to a non-empty string, only files that contains the substring will be shown. [filename_filter](#class-filedialog-property-filename-filter) can be edited by the user with the filter button at the top of the file dialog.

See also [filters](#class-filedialog-property-filters), which should be used to restrict the file types that can be selected instead of [filename_filter](#class-filedialog-property-filename-filter) which is meant to be set by the user.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-property-filters"></a>

[PackedStringArray](class_packedstringarray.md#class-packedstringarray) **filters** = `PackedStringArray()` [🔗](#class-filedialog-property-filters)

-  **set_filters**(value: [PackedStringArray](class_packedstringarray.md#class-packedstringarray))
- [PackedStringArray](class_packedstringarray.md#class-packedstringarray) **get_filters**()

The available file type filters. Each filter string in the array should be formatted like this: `*.png,*.jpg,*.jpeg;Image Files;image/png,image/jpeg`. The description text of the filter is optional and can be omitted. Both file extensions and MIME type should be always set.

**Note:** Embedded file dialogs and Windows file dialogs support only file extensions, while Android, Linux, and macOS file dialogs also support MIME types.

**Note:** The returned array is *copied* and any changes to it will not update the original property value. See [PackedStringArray](class_packedstringarray.md#class-packedstringarray) for more details.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-property-folder-creation-enabled"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **folder_creation_enabled** = `true` [🔗](#class-filedialog-property-folder-creation-enabled)

-  **set_customization_flag_enabled**(flag: [Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization), enabled: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_customization_flag_enabled**(flag: [Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization)) 

If `true`, shows the button for creating new directories (when using [FILE_MODE_OPEN_DIR](#class-filedialog-constant-file-mode-open-dir), [FILE_MODE_OPEN_ANY](#class-filedialog-constant-file-mode-open-any), or [FILE_MODE_SAVE_FILE](#class-filedialog-constant-file-mode-save-file)), and the context menu will have the "New Folder..." option.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-property-hidden-files-toggle-enabled"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **hidden_files_toggle_enabled** = `true` [🔗](#class-filedialog-property-hidden-files-toggle-enabled)

-  **set_customization_flag_enabled**(flag: [Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization), enabled: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_customization_flag_enabled**(flag: [Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization)) 

If `true`, shows the toggle hidden files button.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-property-layout-toggle-enabled"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **layout_toggle_enabled** = `true` [🔗](#class-filedialog-property-layout-toggle-enabled)

-  **set_customization_flag_enabled**(flag: [Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization), enabled: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_customization_flag_enabled**(flag: [Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization)) 

If `true`, shows the layout switch buttons (list/thumbnails).

---

<a id="class-filedialog-property-mode-overrides-title"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **mode_overrides_title** = `true` [🔗](#class-filedialog-property-mode-overrides-title)

-  **set_mode_overrides_title**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_mode_overriding_title**()

If `true`, changing the [file_mode](#class-filedialog-property-file-mode) property will set the window title accordingly (e.g. setting [file_mode](#class-filedialog-property-file-mode) to [FILE_MODE_OPEN_FILE](#class-filedialog-constant-file-mode-open-file) will change the window title to "Open a File").

---

<a id="class-filedialog-property-option-count"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **option_count** = `0` [🔗](#class-filedialog-property-option-count)

-  **set_option_count**(value: [int](class_int.md#class-int))
- [int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_option_count**()

The number of additional [OptionButton](class_optionbutton.md#class-optionbutton)s and [CheckBox](class_checkbox.md#class-checkbox)es in the dialog.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-property-overwrite-warning-enabled"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **overwrite_warning_enabled** = `true` [🔗](#class-filedialog-property-overwrite-warning-enabled)

-  **set_customization_flag_enabled**(flag: [Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization), enabled: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_customization_flag_enabled**(flag: [Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization)) 

If `true`, the **FileDialog** will warn the user before overwriting files in save mode.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-property-recent-list-enabled"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **recent_list_enabled** = `true` [🔗](#class-filedialog-property-recent-list-enabled)

-  **set_customization_flag_enabled**(flag: [Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization), enabled: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_customization_flag_enabled**(flag: [Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization)) 

If `true`, shows the recent directories list on the left side of the dialog.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-property-root-subfolder"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **root_subfolder** = `""` [🔗](#class-filedialog-property-root-subfolder)

-  **set_root_subfolder**(value: [String](class_string.md#class-string))
- [String](class_string.md#class-string) **get_root_subfolder**()

If non-empty, the given sub-folder will be "root" of this **FileDialog**, i.e. user won't be able to go to its parent directory.

**Note:** This property is ignored by native file dialogs.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-property-show-hidden-files"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **show_hidden_files** = `false` [🔗](#class-filedialog-property-show-hidden-files)

-  **set_show_hidden_files**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_showing_hidden_files**()

If `true`, the dialog will show hidden files.

**Note:** This property is ignored by native file dialogs on Android and Linux.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-property-use-native-dialog"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **use_native_dialog** = `false` [🔗](#class-filedialog-property-use-native-dialog)

-  **set_use_native_dialog**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **get_use_native_dialog**()

If `true`, and if supported by the current [DisplayServer](class_displayserver.md#class-displayserver), OS native dialog will be used instead of custom one.

**Note:** On Android, it is only supported for Android 10+ devices and when using [ACCESS_FILESYSTEM](#class-filedialog-constant-access-filesystem). For access mode [ACCESS_RESOURCES](#class-filedialog-constant-access-resources) and [ACCESS_USERDATA](#class-filedialog-constant-access-userdata), the system will fall back to custom FileDialog.

**Note:** On Linux and macOS, sandboxed apps always use native dialogs to access the host file system.

**Note:** On macOS, sandboxed apps will save security-scoped bookmarks to retain access to the opened folders across multiple sessions. Use [OS.get_granted_permissions()](class_os.md#class-os-method-get-granted-permissions) to get a list of saved bookmarks.

**Note:** Native dialogs are isolated from the base process, file dialog properties can't be modified once the dialog is shown.

**Note:** This property is ignored in [EditorFileDialog](class_editorfiledialog.md#class-editorfiledialog).

---

## Method Descriptions

<a id="class-filedialog-method-add-filter"></a>

 **add_filter**(filter: [String](class_string.md#class-string), description: [String](class_string.md#class-string) = "", mime_type: [String](class_string.md#class-string) = "") [🔗](#class-filedialog-method-add-filter)

Adds a comma-separated file extension `filter` and comma-separated MIME type `mime_type` option to the **FileDialog** with an optional `description`, which restricts what files can be picked.

A `filter` should be of the form `"filename.extension"`, where filename and extension can be `*` to match any string. Filters starting with `.` (i.e. empty filenames) are not allowed.

For example, a `filter` of `"*.png, *.jpg"`, a `mime_type` of `image/png, image/jpeg`, and a `description` of `"Images"` results in filter text "Images (\*.png, \*.jpg)".

**Note:** Embedded file dialogs and Windows file dialogs support only file extensions, while Android, Linux, and macOS file dialogs also support MIME types.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-method-add-option"></a>

 **add_option**(name: [String](class_string.md#class-string), values: [PackedStringArray](class_packedstringarray.md#class-packedstringarray), default_value_index: [int](class_int.md#class-int)) [🔗](#class-filedialog-method-add-option)

Adds an additional [OptionButton](class_optionbutton.md#class-optionbutton) to the file dialog. If `values` is empty, a [CheckBox](class_checkbox.md#class-checkbox) is added instead.

`default_value_index` should be an index of the value in the `values`. If `values` is empty it should be either `1` (checked), or `0` (unchecked).

---

<a id="class-filedialog-method-clear-filename-filter"></a>

 **clear_filename_filter**() [🔗](#class-filedialog-method-clear-filename-filter)

Clear the filter for file names.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-method-clear-filters"></a>

 **clear_filters**() [🔗](#class-filedialog-method-clear-filters)

Clear all the added filters in the dialog.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-method-deselect-all"></a>

 **deselect_all**() [🔗](#class-filedialog-method-deselect-all)

Clear all currently selected items in the dialog.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-method-get-favorite-list"></a>

[PackedStringArray](class_packedstringarray.md#class-packedstringarray) **get_favorite_list**()  [🔗](#class-filedialog-method-get-favorite-list)

Returns the list of favorite directories, which is shared by all **FileDialog** nodes. Useful to store the list of favorites between project sessions. This method can be called only from the main thread.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-method-get-line-edit"></a>

[LineEdit](class_lineedit.md#class-lineedit) **get_line_edit**() [🔗](#class-filedialog-method-get-line-edit)

Returns the LineEdit for the selected file.

**Warning:** This is a required internal node, removing and freeing it may cause a crash. If you wish to hide it or any of its children, use their [CanvasItem.visible](class_canvasitem.md#class-canvasitem-property-visible) property.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-method-get-option-default"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_option_default**(option: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-filedialog-method-get-option-default)

Returns the default value index of the [OptionButton](class_optionbutton.md#class-optionbutton) or [CheckBox](class_checkbox.md#class-checkbox) with index `option`.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-method-get-option-name"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **get_option_name**(option: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-filedialog-method-get-option-name)

Returns the name of the [OptionButton](class_optionbutton.md#class-optionbutton) or [CheckBox](class_checkbox.md#class-checkbox) with index `option`.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-method-get-option-values"></a>

[PackedStringArray](class_packedstringarray.md#class-packedstringarray) **get_option_values**(option: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-filedialog-method-get-option-values)

Returns an array of values of the [OptionButton](class_optionbutton.md#class-optionbutton) with index `option`.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-method-get-recent-list"></a>

[PackedStringArray](class_packedstringarray.md#class-packedstringarray) **get_recent_list**()  [🔗](#class-filedialog-method-get-recent-list)

Returns the list of recent directories, which is shared by all **FileDialog** nodes. Useful to store the list of recents between project sessions. This method can be called only from the main thread.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-method-get-selected-options"></a>

[Dictionary](class_dictionary.md#class-dictionary) **get_selected_options**()  [🔗](#class-filedialog-method-get-selected-options)

Returns a [Dictionary](class_dictionary.md#class-dictionary) with the selected values of the additional [OptionButton](class_optionbutton.md#class-optionbutton)s and/or [CheckBox](class_checkbox.md#class-checkbox)es. [Dictionary](class_dictionary.md#class-dictionary) keys are names and values are selected value indices.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-method-get-vbox"></a>

[VBoxContainer](class_vboxcontainer.md#class-vboxcontainer) **get_vbox**() [🔗](#class-filedialog-method-get-vbox)

Returns the vertical box container of the dialog, custom controls can be added to it.

**Warning:** This is a required internal node, removing and freeing it may cause a crash. If you wish to hide it or any of its children, use their [CanvasItem.visible](class_canvasitem.md#class-canvasitem-property-visible) property.

**Note:** Changes to this node are ignored by native file dialogs, use [add_option()](#class-filedialog-method-add-option) to add custom elements to the dialog instead.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-method-invalidate"></a>

 **invalidate**() [🔗](#class-filedialog-method-invalidate)

Invalidates and updates this dialog's content list.

**Note:** This method does nothing on native file dialogs.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-method-is-customization-flag-enabled"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_customization_flag_enabled**(flag: [Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization))  [🔗](#class-filedialog-method-is-customization-flag-enabled)

Returns `true` if the provided `flag` is enabled.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-method-popup-file-dialog"></a>

 **popup_file_dialog**() [🔗](#class-filedialog-method-popup-file-dialog)

Shows the **FileDialog** using the default size and position for file dialogs, and selects the file name if there is a current file.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-method-set-customization-flag-enabled"></a>

 **set_customization_flag_enabled**(flag: [Customization](#enum-filedialog-customization), enabled: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool)) [🔗](#class-filedialog-method-set-customization-flag-enabled)

Sets the specified customization `flag`, allowing to customize the features available in this **FileDialog**.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-method-set-favorite-list"></a>

 **set_favorite_list**(favorites: [PackedStringArray](class_packedstringarray.md#class-packedstringarray))  [🔗](#class-filedialog-method-set-favorite-list)

Sets the list of favorite directories, which is shared by all **FileDialog** nodes. Useful to restore the list of favorites saved with [get_favorite_list()](#class-filedialog-method-get-favorite-list). This method can be called only from the main thread.

**Note:** **FileDialog** will update its internal [ItemList](class_itemlist.md#class-itemlist) of favorites when its visibility changes. Be sure to call this method earlier if you want your changes to have effect.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-method-set-get-icon-callback"></a>

 **set_get_icon_callback**(callback: [Callable](class_callable.md#class-callable))  [🔗](#class-filedialog-method-set-get-icon-callback)

Sets the callback used by the **FileDialog** nodes to get a file icon, when [DISPLAY_LIST](#class-filedialog-constant-display-list) mode is used. The callback should take a single [String](class_string.md#class-string) argument (file path), and return a [Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d). If an invalid texture is returned, the [file](#class-filedialog-theme-icon-file) icon will be used instead.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-method-set-get-thumbnail-callback"></a>

 **set_get_thumbnail_callback**(callback: [Callable](class_callable.md#class-callable))  [🔗](#class-filedialog-method-set-get-thumbnail-callback)

Sets the callback used by the **FileDialog** nodes to get a file icon, when [DISPLAY_THUMBNAILS](#class-filedialog-constant-display-thumbnails) mode is used. The callback should take a single [String](class_string.md#class-string) argument (file path), and return a [Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d). If an invalid texture is returned, the [file_thumbnail](#class-filedialog-theme-icon-file-thumbnail) icon will be used instead.

Thumbnails are usually more complex and may take a while to load. To avoid stalling the application, you can use [ImageTexture](class_imagetexture.md#class-imagetexture) to asynchronously create the thumbnail.

```gdscript
func _ready():
    FileDialog.set_get_thumbnail_callback(thumbnail_method)

func thumbnail_method(path):
    var image_texture = ImageTexture.new()
    make_thumbnail_async(path, image_texture)
    return image_texture

func make_thumbnail_async(path, image_texture):
    var thumbnail_texture = await generate_thumbnail(path) # Some method that generates a thumbnail.
    image_texture.set_image(thumbnail_texture.get_image())
```

---

<a id="class-filedialog-method-set-option-default"></a>

 **set_option_default**(option: [int](class_int.md#class-int), default_value_index: [int](class_int.md#class-int)) [🔗](#class-filedialog-method-set-option-default)

Sets the default value index of the [OptionButton](class_optionbutton.md#class-optionbutton) or [CheckBox](class_checkbox.md#class-checkbox) with index `option`.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-method-set-option-name"></a>

 **set_option_name**(option: [int](class_int.md#class-int), name: [String](class_string.md#class-string)) [🔗](#class-filedialog-method-set-option-name)

Sets the name of the [OptionButton](class_optionbutton.md#class-optionbutton) or [CheckBox](class_checkbox.md#class-checkbox) with index `option`.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-method-set-option-values"></a>

 **set_option_values**(option: [int](class_int.md#class-int), values: [PackedStringArray](class_packedstringarray.md#class-packedstringarray)) [🔗](#class-filedialog-method-set-option-values)

Sets the option values of the [OptionButton](class_optionbutton.md#class-optionbutton) with index `option`.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-method-set-recent-list"></a>

 **set_recent_list**(recents: [PackedStringArray](class_packedstringarray.md#class-packedstringarray))  [🔗](#class-filedialog-method-set-recent-list)

Sets the list of recent directories, which is shared by all **FileDialog** nodes. Useful to restore the list of recents saved with [set_recent_list()](#class-filedialog-method-set-recent-list). This method can be called only from the main thread.

**Note:** **FileDialog** will update its internal [ItemList](class_itemlist.md#class-itemlist) of recent directories when its visibility changes. Be sure to call this method earlier if you want your changes to have effect.

---

## Theme Property Descriptions

<a id="class-filedialog-theme-color-file-disabled-color"></a>

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) **file_disabled_color** = `Color(1, 1, 1, 0.25)` [🔗](#class-filedialog-theme-color-file-disabled-color)

The color tint for disabled files (when the **FileDialog** is used in open folder mode).

---

<a id="class-filedialog-theme-color-file-icon-color"></a>

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) **file_icon_color** = `Color(1, 1, 1, 1)` [🔗](#class-filedialog-theme-color-file-icon-color)

The color modulation applied to the file icon.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-theme-color-folder-icon-color"></a>

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) **folder_icon_color** = `Color(1, 1, 1, 1)` [🔗](#class-filedialog-theme-color-folder-icon-color)

The color modulation applied to the folder icon.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-theme-constant-thumbnail-size"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **thumbnail_size** = `64` [🔗](#class-filedialog-theme-constant-thumbnail-size)

The size of thumbnail icons when [DISPLAY_THUMBNAILS](#class-filedialog-constant-display-thumbnails) is enabled.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-theme-icon-back-folder"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **back_folder** [🔗](#class-filedialog-theme-icon-back-folder)

Custom icon for the back arrow.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-theme-icon-create-folder"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **create_folder** [🔗](#class-filedialog-theme-icon-create-folder)

Custom icon for the create folder button.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-theme-icon-favorite"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **favorite** [🔗](#class-filedialog-theme-icon-favorite)

Custom icon for favorite folder button.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-theme-icon-favorite-down"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **favorite_down** [🔗](#class-filedialog-theme-icon-favorite-down)

Custom icon for button to move down a favorite entry.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-theme-icon-favorite-up"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **favorite_up** [🔗](#class-filedialog-theme-icon-favorite-up)

Custom icon for button to move up a favorite entry.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-theme-icon-file"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **file** [🔗](#class-filedialog-theme-icon-file)

Custom icon for files.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-theme-icon-file-thumbnail"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **file_thumbnail** [🔗](#class-filedialog-theme-icon-file-thumbnail)

Icon for files when in thumbnail mode.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-theme-icon-folder"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **folder** [🔗](#class-filedialog-theme-icon-folder)

Custom icon for folders.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-theme-icon-folder-thumbnail"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **folder_thumbnail** [🔗](#class-filedialog-theme-icon-folder-thumbnail)

Icon for folders when in thumbnail mode.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-theme-icon-forward-folder"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **forward_folder** [🔗](#class-filedialog-theme-icon-forward-folder)

Custom icon for the forward arrow.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-theme-icon-list-mode"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **list_mode** [🔗](#class-filedialog-theme-icon-list-mode)

Icon for the button that enables list mode.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-theme-icon-parent-folder"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **parent_folder** [🔗](#class-filedialog-theme-icon-parent-folder)

Custom icon for the parent folder arrow.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-theme-icon-reload"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **reload** [🔗](#class-filedialog-theme-icon-reload)

Custom icon for the reload button.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-theme-icon-sort"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **sort** [🔗](#class-filedialog-theme-icon-sort)

Custom icon for the sorting options menu.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-theme-icon-thumbnail-mode"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **thumbnail_mode** [🔗](#class-filedialog-theme-icon-thumbnail-mode)

Icon for the button that enables thumbnail mode.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-theme-icon-toggle-filename-filter"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **toggle_filename_filter** [🔗](#class-filedialog-theme-icon-toggle-filename-filter)

Custom icon for the toggle button for the filter for file names.

---

<a id="class-filedialog-theme-icon-toggle-hidden"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **toggle_hidden** [🔗](#class-filedialog-theme-icon-toggle-hidden)

Custom icon for the toggle hidden button.
